calendar.matters:
Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Feb-22-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Rebecca Wagner, Esq., Assistant District Attorney, T:415.553.4997, for petitioner/moving party;
No other appearance.

Petitioner's counsel has previously stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING: There being no appearance by Claimant Adam Pilger, or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is unopposed and is GRANTED.

ORDER SIGNED in open court. Counsel for petitioner is to serve the order and shall exert all efforts to make sure that the order reaches the individual claimant.

Judge Pro Tem: Diana Kruze; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Dec-07-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Rebecca D. Wagner, of Office of the City Attorney, Tel. 415.551.4997, for petitioners;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted, no opposition. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
